sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Tetra Tech Appoints Susan Hardwick to Board of Directors
feed.summary: Tetra Tech announced the appointment of Susan Hardwick, former CEO of American Water, to its Board of Directors, effective December 29, 2025. Her extensive experience in utilities, financial strategy, and operations is expected to bolster Tetra Tech's governance and support its global water consulting expansion. An analyst has rated TTEK stock as a Buy with a $37.00 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates it as an Outperform, citing strong earnings tempered by valuation concerns.

feed.title: Ex-American Water CEO joins firm shaping global water and energy projects
feed.summary: Tetra Tech (NASDAQ: TTEK) has appointed M. Susan Hardwick, the recently retired CEO of American Water, to its Board of Directors, effective December 29, 2025. Hardwick, with over 35 years of experience in water and energy utilities, will serve on the Audit Committee and the Nominating and Corporate Governance Committee. Her expertise in financial acumen, long-term capital planning, and utility operations is expected to be invaluable as Tetra Tech expands its global water consulting services.

feed.title: Tetra Tech appoints former US Ecology CEO Jeff Feeler to board
feed.summary: Tetra Tech, Inc. (NASDAQ:TTEK) announced the appointment of Jeffrey R. Feeler, former Chairman, CEO, and President of US Ecology, to its Board of Directors, effective December 29, 2025. Feeler brings over 30 years of operational, financial, and governance experience, having significantly expanded US Ecology's revenue during his leadership. This appointment, coupled with the recent exceeding of analyst expectations in Q4 2025 earnings and new contracts, highlights Tetra Tech's continued strategic growth and strong financial health.

feed.title: Invesco S&P 500 equal weight financials ETF declares quarterly distribution of $0.2886
feed.summary: The Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight Financials ETF (NYSEARCA:RYF) has declared a quarterly distribution of $0.2886 per share. This distribution is payable on December 29, 2023, to shareholders of record as of December 26, 2023, with an ex-dividend date of December 22, 2023.

feed.title: RadNet (NASDAQ:RDNT) Trading Down 3.5% - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: RadNet (NASDAQ:RDNT) shares fell 3.5% on Monday with significantly lower trading volume, closing at $73.99. Despite a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and an average price target of $87.60 from analysts following several upgrades, some analysts and Weiss Ratings remain negative. The company reported mixed fundamentals, missing EPS estimates while seeing revenue growth, but has a negative net margin, and insiders have recently sold shares.

feed.title: Levi & Korsinsky Notifies Primo Brands Corporation / Primo Water Corporation (PRMB) Investors - Lead Plaintiff Deadline on January 12, 2026
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has announced that a securities class action lawsuit has been filed on behalf of investors who purchased Primo Brands Corporation / Primo Water Corporation (PRMB) securities between June 17, 2024, and November 6, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that the company made false statements and concealed issues regarding the merger integration with BlueTriton Brands, leading to investor losses. Investors have until January 12, 2026, to act as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: |Why Are Huntington Ingalls Shares Jumping? Navy Contract Drives Gains
feed.summary: |Huntington Ingalls Industries (HII) shares surged in premarket trading after the U.S. Navy awarded the company a contract to design and build a new class of small warships. This contract, alongside President Trump's announcement of plans for new "Trump-class" battleships, has driven HII's stock to record highs, outperforming the S&P 500 significantly year-to-date. The company is now well-positioned for further defense contracts as the Navy expands its fleet.

feed.title: FCX DEADLINE ALERT: ROSEN, SKILLED INVESTOR COUNSEL, Encourages Freeport-McMoRan Inc. Investors to Secure Counsel Before Important Deadline in Securities Class Action First Filed by The Firm - FCX
feed.summary: Rosen Law Firm is encouraging investors of Freeport-McMoRan Inc. (NYSE:FCX) to secure legal counsel before an important deadline of January 12, 2026, in a securities class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Freeport-McMoRan made false and misleading statements regarding safety measures at its Grasberg Block Cave mine in Indonesia, leading to undisclosed risks and investor damages. Investors who purchased FCX securities between February 15, 2022, and September 24, 2025, may be entitled to compensation.

feed.title: Kroger's Board of Directors Approves Additional $2.0 Billion Share Repurchase Authorization
feed.summary: The Kroger Co.'s Board of Directors has approved an additional $2.0 billion share repurchase authorization, bringing the total available under authorization to approximately $2.9 billion. This decision reflects the Board's confidence in Kroger's growth outlook and commitment to disciplined capital allocation. Kroger aims to fund these repurchases with cash from operations and existing liquidity, while also maintaining its investment-grade credit rating and continuing to pay and increase its quarterly dividend over time.

feed.title: Constellation Announces Extension of Expiration for Private Exchange Offers and Consent Solicitations and Early Tender Results
feed.summary: Constellation Energy Generation, LLC has extended the expiration date for its private exchange offers and consent solicitations for Calpine Corporation's outstanding notes to January 12, 2026. This extension allows more time for eligible holders to participate in exchanging their existing notes for newly issued Constellation notes. The company also announced that it has received the necessary consents from noteholders to amend the Calpine Notes and their governing indentures based on early tender results, eliminating most restrictive covenants and events of default, pending the consummation of a merger transaction between Constellation Energy Corporation and Calpine.

feed.title: New hypersonic rocket deal could cut test costs and speed up launches
feed.summary: Kratos has issued a letter of intent to L3Harris for 60 Zeus hypersonic solid rocket motors, comprising 40 Zeus 1 and 20 Zeus 2 models. This strategic move aims to support hypersonic testing, targets, and special missions by enabling more frequent, faster, and farther flights at a reduced cost. Kratos internally funded the development of these 32.5-inch diameter SRMs, which are designed for full-rate production, compatibility with existing infrastructure, and rapid integration of advanced payloads.

feed.title: Biotech Cassava will pay $31.25M to end investor lawsuit from 2021
feed.summary: Cassava Sciences has announced a definitive agreement to settle a consolidated securities class action lawsuit for $31.25 million. This settlement resolves claims related to stock purchases or option trades between September 14, 2020, and October 12, 2023, and although it is not an admission of fault, it will free the company to focus on developing simufilam for TSC-related epilepsy. Cassava had already recorded a $31.25 million loss contingency in Q2 2025 for this matter.

feed.title: Capital One Financial PFDs: What's In Your Portfolio? (NYSE:COF)
feed.summary: Capital One Financial preferred stocks offer income potential due to anticipated FOMC rate cuts and strong dividend coverage (15.5x net income/pfd dividends) and robust equity (20x total common equity/pfd), mitigating credit risk. All COF preferreds are BB-rated, non-cumulative, and tax-advantaged; the Series L is recommended as a "Buy" due to its low call risk and attractive yield compared to other COF issues and major bank preferreds. The author emphasizes managing call risk by selecting non-callable or lower-coupon preferreds to minimize early redemption exposure.

feed.title: SLB Earnings Preview: What to Expect
feed.summary: SLB N.V. (SLB) is set to announce its Q4 2025 results on January 23rd, with analysts expecting an adjusted EPS of $0.74, a decrease from the previous year. Despite a Q3 beat, shares fell due to management's cautious outlook on North American drilling activity and operational softness. Analysts currently have a "Strong Buy" rating on SLB, with an average price target that suggests a 23.1% upside.

feed.title: Bio-Techne to Present at the 2026 J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference
feed.summary: Bio-Techne Corporation announced that its President and CEO, Kim Kelderman, will present at the 2026 J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on January 13, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. PST. A live webcast of the presentation will be available on the company's Investor Relations website. Bio-Techne is a global life sciences company providing tools and reagents for research and diagnostics, with over $1.2 billion in net sales in fiscal 2025.
